name: SKY130 Bandpass Filter
description: 2nd-order Gm-C or switched-capacitor bandpass filter (0.5 Hz to 150 Hz) for ECG signal conditioning

f_low_hz.description: Lower -3 dB cutoff frequency (high-pass, removes electrode DC offset)

f_high_hz.description: Upper -3 dB cutoff frequency (low-pass, anti-alias for ADC)

passband_ripple_db.description: Maximum gain variation within the 0.5-150 Hz passband

stopband_atten_250hz_db.description: Attenuation at 250 Hz (Nyquist for 500 SPS ADC mode)
